data.title: NBA star Thompson: Will not issue tokens, predicts Bitcoin will reach $150,000 by the end of the year
data.description: NBA star Tristan Thompson stated in an interview that he will not issue a personal token or other cryptocurrency, stating that he will remain in the cryptocurrency space for the long term and is currently building a personal cryptocurrency portfolio. He also predicted that Bitcoin will reach $150,000 by the end of the year. Earlier news broke that NBA star Tristan Thompson would launch basketball.fun, a player tokenization platform.

data.title: Binance Square Launches Holoworld AI Token Reward Campaign
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, a new campaign on CreatorPad is set to offer 255,600 Holoworld AI (HOLO) token voucher rewards to verified users who complete specific tasks. CreatorPad, a platform on Binance Square, allows users to earn token rewards by engaging in various activities. The campaign will run from 2025-09-25 09:00 (UTC) to 2025-10-27 9:00 (UTC).

The campaign introduces a Mindshare Leaderboard, launched on 2025-07-17, which evaluates users based on the quality and consistency of their content. Verified Binance users can participate by completing tasks to unlock a share of 230,040 HOLO in token vouchers. Additionally, 25,560 HOLO token vouchers are reserved for the top 50 creators on the Square Creator Leaderboard, determined by the 7-day rankings at the campaign's start.

Participants must complete three tasks to qualify for the reward pool. Task 1 involves creating content on Binance Square with specific criteria, including a minimum of 100 characters about Holoworld AI, using designated hashtags, and mentioning the project's account. Task 2 requires following the project's account on Binance Square and X. Task 3 involves trading a minimum of $10 in HOLO through spot, futures, or convert transactions.

The rewards are distributed based on the leaderboard results at the campaign's end. The top 100 creators on the Holoworld AI 30D Project Leaderboard will share 178,920 HOLO, while remaining participants will share 51,120 HOLO. An additional 25,560 HOLO is allocated for the top 50 creators on the Square Creator Leaderboard, divided into three ranking groups. Participants must adhere to Binance's guidelines and maintain their posts for 60 days post-campaign to remain eligible for rewards.

data.title: Today, 11 addresses increased their holdings of 295,861 ETH from institutions, worth approximately $1.19 billion.
data.description: According to lookonchain monitoring, a total of 11 wallets received 295,861 ETH (about 1.19 billion US dollars) from Kraken, Galaxy Digital OTC, BitGo and FalconX today.

data.title: Tokenized Stocks on Ethereum Surge to $275M in September
data.description: Key Takeaways:The value of tokenized stocks on Ethereum climbed to $275 million in September, according to Messari.The milestone underscores Ethereum’s growing role in real-world asset (RWA) tokenization.Institutional and DeFi demand for on-chain equities continues to accelerate.The market value of tokenized stocks on Ethereum surged to $275 million in September, according to data shared by Messari. The sharp rise reflects Ethereum’s expanding role as the leading blockchain for real-world asset (RWA) tokenization, particularly equities.Tokenized stocks allow investors to gain exposure to traditional equity markets directly on-chain, combining 24/7 trading access with the benefits of blockchain settlement. Analysts note that the increase highlights growing institutional adoption and the push by decentralized finance (DeFi) protocols to bridge traditional markets with blockchain infrastructure.The latest milestone comes as tokenized assets—including bonds, treasuries, and real estate—continue to attract capital, with Ethereum serving as the dominant platform for issuance.

data.title: Binance Alpha to List ChainOpera AI (COAI) With Airdrop for Eligible Users
data.description: Key Takeaways:Binance Alpha will open trading for ChainOpera AI (COAI) on Sept. 25, 2025, at 15:00 (UTC+8).Users holding at least 200 Alpha Points can claim a 250 COAI token airdrop.The threshold will drop by 15 points every hour until the promotion ends.Binance Alpha announced it will list ChainOpera AI (COAI), with trading set to start at 15:00 (UTC+8) on September 25, 2025.To celebrate the launch, eligible users can claim a 250 COAI airdrop on a first-come, first-served basis through the Binance Alpha event page. The campaign starts with a 200 Alpha Points threshold, which will automatically decrease by 15 points every hour until the event concludes.

data.description:

data.title: Institutional Wallets Accumulate $1.19B in Ethereum, On-Chain Data Shows
data.description:
Key Takeaways:11 addresses added 295,861 ETH today, worth about $1. 19 billion. Funds originated from Kraken, Galaxy Digital OTC, BitGo, and FalconX. Signals renewed institutional demand for Ethereum despite market volatility
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/30157163640202?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Global gold ETFs increased their holdings by 27 tons last Friday, the largest single-day increase since January 2022
data.description: The Kobeissi Letter, in a post on the X platform, reported that global gold ETF holdings increased by 27 tons last Friday, the largest single-day increase since January 2022 and double the average daily increase so far this year. Gold ETF holdings rose 0.9% in a single day, the largest single-day percentage gain since 2022. Gold prices are on track for their sixth consecutive week of gains, their longest winning streak since February. Furthermore, daily trading volume in the largest silver ETF, Silver Leveraged Lottery (SLV), surged to 1.2 million contracts last Friday, the highest level since April 2024.

data.title: Abraxas Capital Increases Short Positions on Aster
data.description: According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, HyperInsight monitoring reveals that in the past two hours, the address labeled as Abraxas Capital (0xb83) has significantly increased its short positions on Aster, accumulating over 2 million units. The trading preferences of this address closely align with its main address, with a total holding of approximately $404 million and an unrealized profit of around $9.46 million. Currently, all positions are short, with this week's profits reaching about $54.31 million. The primary short positions include approximately $146 million in ETH, another $110 million in ETH, and around $49.5 million in SOL.

data.title: Binance Launches the Blockchain 100 Award to Recognize Top Global Web3 Creators
data.description: Key Takeaways:Nominations Open: Sept. 25 – Oct. 12, 2025Community Voting: Oct. 15 – Oct. 26, 2025Winners Announced: Nov. 3, 2025Award Ceremony: Dec. 3, 2025, at Binance Blockchain WeekHonoring Web3’s Leading VoicesBinance has introduced The Blockchain 100 Award, a global initiative recognizing creators who advance crypto adoption through education, research, content creation, and community-building.The award highlights 100 creators worldwide who have made outstanding contributions to blockchain innovation and public awareness, offering exposure through media partnerships and Web3 collaborations.Award TimelinePublic Nominations: Sept. 25, 09:00 UTC – Oct. 12, 23:59 UTCCommunity Voting: Oct. 15, 09:00 UTC – Oct. 26, 23:59 UTCFinal Results: Nov. 3, 09:00 UTCAward Ceremony: Dec. 3, 2025, during Binance Blockchain WeekAward CategoriesNominees can compete in seven categories, with winners selected through community voting:Industry Advocate (20 winners): Founders, entrepreneurs, and ecosystem promotersIndependent Researcher (20 winners): Analysts and researchers publishing original insightsTrader (20 winners): Creators offering market analysis and trading strategiesCommunity Builder (10 winners): Influencers fostering Web3 and DAO communitiesVideo & Live Creator (10 winners): Content creators excelling in video or livestreamsCrypto Press (10 winners): Journalists and media covering blockchain and cryptoRising Star (10 winners): Up-and-coming creators making an impactHow to ParticipateNominate: Anyone can submit nominations, including self-nominations, via the Blockchain 100 event page.Vote: Binance-verified users can vote once per category per day during the voting period.Recognition: Winners will be awarded at the Blockchain Week ceremony, receiving physical medals and global recognition.

data.title: Institutional Wallets Accumulate $1.19B in Ethereum, On-Chain Data Shows
data.description: Key Takeaways:11 addresses added 295,861 ETH today, worth about $1.19 billion.Funds originated from Kraken, Galaxy Digital OTC, BitGo, and FalconX.Signals renewed institutional demand for Ethereum despite market volatility.According to on-chain monitoring by Lookonchain, a total of 11 wallets accumulated 295,861 ETH (valued at roughly $1.19 billion) on Thursday.The assets were transferred from major institutional platforms including Kraken, Galaxy Digital OTC, BitGo, and FalconX, suggesting heightened accumulation by large-scale investors.

data.title: Global Gold ETFs Record Largest Daily Inflow Since 2022 as Holdings Jump 27 Tons
data.description: Key Takeaways:Global gold ETFs added 27 tons last Friday, the biggest one-day increase since January 2022.The gain was twice the average daily inflow this year, pushing ETF holdings up 0.9% in a single day.Gold is on track for a sixth straight weekly gain, its longest winning streak since February.Silver also saw momentum, with SLV trading volume hitting 1.2 million contracts, the highest since April 2024.Global gold exchange-traded funds (ETFs) saw a surge in demand last Friday, adding 27 tons in a single day—the largest daily increase since January 2022, according to data shared by The Kobeissi Letter.The inflow marked a 0.9% rise in total ETF holdings, also the strongest one-day percentage jump since 2022. Analysts note that the spike is double this year’s average daily inflow, signaling strong institutional demand amid macro uncertainty.Gold prices are now heading for their sixth consecutive weekly gain, marking the longest positive streak since February, as investors continue to seek safe-haven exposure.Meanwhile, silver markets showed heightened activity, with the largest silver ETF (SLV) recording a trading volume of 1.2 million contracts on Friday, its busiest day since April 2024.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Faces Pressure as September Ends
data.description: According to BlockBeats, as September draws to a close, the cryptocurrency market remains under pressure. The U.S. stock market experienced a significant decline overnight, although Chinese stocks showed resilience, outperforming the broader market. Bitcoin is currently holding at the $111,700 support level, while Ethereum has fallen below the $4,100 mark it maintained since early August.If prices break further, recent lows may be retested, with the next levels to watch being $107,000 for Bitcoin and $3,300 for Ethereum. Despite the market sell-off, there is little indication of weakened institutional demand. A Bitcoin spot ETF attracted $241 million in inflows overnight, ending two consecutive days of outflows. Signs of buying on dips remain evident, with $118,000 Bitcoin call options dominating options trading activity for October.As the fourth quarter approaches, historically a more positive period, market optimism persists, supported by a more relaxed credit environment. The market currently anticipates two 25 basis point interest rate cuts in October and December. This expectation is likely to continue unless next week's non-farm payroll data is unexpectedly strong.

data.title: Binance Alpha Launches Plasma (XPL) Airdrop With 200 Alpha Point Minimum
data.description: Key Takeaways:Binance Alpha is the first platform to launch Plasma (XPL) trading on Sept. 25, 2025, at 19:00 (UTC+8).Phase 1 airdrop: Users need 200 Alpha Points to claim 180 XPL tokens.Phase 2 airdrop: Threshold drops to 100 Alpha Points, decreasing 15 points per hour in final six hours.Plasma (XPL) Debuts on Binance AlphaBinance Alpha announced it will be the first platform to list Plasma (XPL), a Layer 1 blockchain designed for stablecoin payments. Trading begins on Sept. 25, 2025, at 19:00 (UTC+8).Eligible Binance users can claim 180 XPL tokens within 24 hours of the trading launch by redeeming Alpha Points on the Alpha event page.Two-Phase Airdrop StructurePhase 1 (first 18 hours): Minimum requirement of 200 Alpha Points to participate.Phase 2 (last 6 hours): Minimum requirement drops to 100 Alpha Points. The threshold will automatically decrease by 15 points every hour until the event closes, with rewards distributed on a first-come, first-served basis.

data.title: Stablecoin payment company RedotPay completes $47 million financing, led by Coinbase Ventures
data.description: Stablecoin payment company RedotPay has completed a $47 million strategic funding round, pushing its valuation past $1 billion and officially becoming a fintech unicorn. This round was led by Coinbase Ventures, with continued support from Galaxy Ventures and Vertex Ventures, as well as participation from an undisclosed global tech entrepreneur. Founded in April 2023, RedotPay provides stablecoin payment cards, multi-currency wallets, and global payment services. To date, the company has over 5 million users and a total payment transaction volume of $10 billion. Its global payment service, launched in June of this year, has made inroads in less-developed regions such as Latin America, enabling direct transfers of cryptocurrencies to local bank accounts or e-wallets. RedotPay is currently headquartered in Hong Kong, with branches in Europe and Argentina. Having obtained licenses in the relevant regions, RedotPay plans to further expand its global business channels, deepen collaborations with banks and payment networks, and prioritize global licensing and regulatory compliance. Earlier news reported that RedotPay had completed a $40 million Series A funding round in March of this year, led by Lightspeed, with participation from HSG and Galaxy Ventures. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Gonka AI's network-wide computing resources reach 500 H100 GPUs
data.description: According to official information, the Gonka network currently boasts computing power equivalent to 500 H100 GPUs. Unlike traditional centralized private clouds, this computing power is distributed and contributed by global participants, forming an open and shared computing network. This avoids monopoly and control by a single institution, and opens new possibilities for the widespread adoption and innovation of high-performance computing. As previously reported, the Gonka mainnet has officially launched, and AI inference services are currently completely free. Contributors receive daily rewards in GNK tokens based on their computing power contribution. 323,000 GNK tokens are minted each epoch, decreasing over time to create a scarcity curve and ensure predictable incentives. Gonka is reportedly incubated by US AI developer Product Science Inc. Founded by the Libermans siblings, Web 2 industry veterans and former core product directors at Snap Inc., the company successfully raised $18 million in 2023 from investors including OpenAI investor Coatue Management, Solana investor Slow Ventures, K5, Insight, and Benchmark Partners. Early contributors to the project include well-known leaders in the Web 2-Web 3 space, such as 6 Blocks, Hard Yaka, Gcore, and Bitfury.

data.title: Digital RMB International Operations Center officially opens in Shanghai
data.description: The Digital RMB International Operations Center has officially begun operations in Shanghai, launching three major business platforms: the Digital RMB Cross-Border Digital Payment Platform, the Blockchain Service Platform, and the Digital Asset Platform. The cross-border digital payment platform aims to address the pain points of traditional cross-border payments; the blockchain service platform provides standardized cross-chain transaction information transfer and on-chain payment services; and the digital asset platform supports the expansion of existing financial infrastructure into on-chain businesses. In June of this year, Pan Gongsheng, Governor of the People's Bank of China, announced the establishment of the center at the Lujiazui Forum to promote the internationalization of the Digital RMB and digital financial innovation. At a promotional event on the 24th, Lu Lei, Deputy Governor of the People's Bank of China, pointed out that the three principles of "losslessness, compliance, and interoperability" have become the basic principles for the construction of cross-border infrastructure for legal digital currencies, and the Digital RMB cross-border financial infrastructure system has been initially established. In the future, the Digital RMB International Operations Center will provide important support for the facilitation of cross-border trade and investment and financing. (Xinhua News Agency)

data.title: TechnoRevenant sold another 377,000 HYPE tokens, worth approximately $16.2 million
data.description: According to MLM monitoring, trader TechnoRevenant began reducing his EVM holdings over the past week, including converting 625,000 KHYPE (valued at $26.6 million) into HYPE. His sell-off caused KHYPE to depreciate by as much as 10% at one point. Estimates suggest his holdings in these EVM protocols range from 1.4 to 1.5 million HYPE (approximately $60 to $65 million). In the past seven hours, he has sold 377,000 HYPE (approximately $16.2 million).

data.title: Binance Alpha to Feature Bitlight Labs (LIGHT) and GOAT Network (GOATED)
data.description: Binance announced on X that Binance Alpha will be the first platform to feature Bitlight Labs (LIGHT) and GOAT Network (GOATED) on September 27, 2025. Eligible users can claim their airdrops using Binance Alpha Points on the Alpha Events page once trading opens. Further details will be announced soon.

data.title: Ethena: S4 points airdrop activity ends, S5 starts today and will last for six months
data.description: Ethena Labs announced in a post on Mirror that the Season 4 airdrop concluded this morning. Season 5 will begin on September 24th, and users have already begun accruing Season 5 points. Similar to previous seasons, users who participated in the Ethena Rewards program will automatically receive bonus rewards for Season 5. Season 5 will last approximately six months. Details on the rewards distribution and specific dates for Season 4 will be announced later. Initial rewards data and preliminary Season 4 statistics will be available on the official website soon.
